one_time_description: Settlement payout of $1,023,000 recorded as expense; also loss on disposal of investment in government partnership of $941,658
economic_notes: Giizhagaakwe Development Corporation harvests timber for sale to a local pulp mill. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain financial impact. Greenstone Gold revenue of $1,489,421 noted. Anishinaabeg Gikinoo A'Maagoziwin Education Authority wound up subsequent to year end.
notes: Audit disclaimer of opinion issued (not a qualified opinion but a disclaimer) due to lack of supporting documentation, lack of audit evidence for Education Authority, and lack of controls over bingo operations. No budget prepared, which is a departure from PSA standards. Loss on disposal of investment in government partnership (Education Authority) of $941,658 recorded as other expense. Settlement payout of $1,023,000 in expenses. One subsidiary fully consolidated (Rocky Shore Development Corporation). One GBE on modified equity basis (Giizhagaakwe Development Corporation). Proportionate consolidation of Anishinaabeg Gikinoo A'Maagoziwin Education Authority at 38.36% interest - subsequently wound up. COVID-19 uncertainty noted as subsequent event. Restricted cash of $3,098 held for CMHC replacement reserve. Schedule 3 is incomplete in the source document (Employment and Economic Development segment cut off).
